---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for SolaSim
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Use Case
Describe the problem this feature would solve, or the workflow it would improve.

## Proposed Solution
If you have a specific implementation in mind, describe it here.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
